title: koelreuteria elegans subsp. elegans
intro: Koelreuteria elegans subsp. elegans is a subspecies of the goldenrain tree, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koelreuteria elegans subsp. elegans include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, among others. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems.
